summary.narrative: Mayor Rhodes-Conway has made substantial progress on her key campaign promises, particularly in housing policy and transit transformation. Her Housing Forward initiative and the Bus Rapid Transit project demonstrate follow-through on major commitments. Some equity and budget sustainability goals remain works in progress.

promises.text: Transform Madison's transit network with Bus Rapid Transit
promises.evidence: The Metro Transit Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) system launched in 2024, representing the largest transit investment in Madison's history with dedicated lanes and improved service.

promises.text: Create policy that makes it easier to build housing
promises.evidence: Launched Housing Forward initiative in 2021 with updates through 2024, established new housing goals aligned with Dane County Regional Housing Strategy, and created public housing tracker for transparency.

promises.text: Expand affordable housing options in Madison
promises.evidence: Administration has prioritized affordable housing funding and policy changes, with ongoing efforts through Housing Forward initiative, though housing affordability challenges persist citywide.

promises.text: Address the city's racial and social inequities
promises.evidence: Equity has been stated as an administration priority with various programs initiated, but measurable progress on closing racial disparities remains ongoing work.
City services have generally been maintained and expanded, including transit improvements and housing programs, though budget pressures have created future sustainability concerns.

promises.text: Maintain fiscal responsibility and sustainable city budgets
promises.evidence: 2024 budget increased spending 5.9% with mayor issuing warnings about future budget sustainability; administration has deferred addressing long-term structural budget challenges.

promises.text: Increase transparency and public engagement in city government
promises.evidence: Created interactive housing tracker for public monitoring of progress; maintained regular public communications about administration priorities and progress.

promises.text: Address climate change and sustainability goals
promises.evidence: BRT investment supports reduced emissions; administration has maintained climate as a stated priority with various sustainability initiatives underway.
